title: The Water of Life
lines: A king lay dying, and no physician could help him.
He was told that only the water of life could save him.
His three sons set out to find it.
The eldest son met a dwarf who told him where to find the water, but the son was rude and refused to listen.
The dwarf caused him to become trapped in a narrow canyon.
The second son met the same dwarf and treated him just as rudely, meeting the same fate.
The youngest son treated the dwarf with kindness and respect.
The dwarf told him that the water of life was guarded by a lion in a magic castle.
The young prince found the castle and the lion, and with the dwarf's help, he obtained the water of life.
He freed his brothers from the canyon and returned home.
The king drank the water and was healed.
The youngest son was rewarded with the throne, and he ruled wisely and well.
